narrative:
Windsor Twp township has 761 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
